name: Fujian Aonong Biological Technology Group Incorporation Limited
summary: Fujian Aonong Biological Technology Group Incorporation Limited engages in the feed, animal protection, pig raising, raw materials trade, agricultural Internet, and other businesses in China and internationally. The company offers nutrition products; professional pig services; probiotics, such as bacillus, lactic acid bacteria, and yeast; and various mixed feed additives and liquid multi-dimensional additives. It also provides vaccines, veterinary drug preparations, micro ecological preparations, powders, premixes, oral liquids, and disinfectants, as well as terminally sterilized and sterilized non-intravenous. In addition, the company offers professional management systems, and information and trading platforms; and information solutions and services for the daily management of downstream pig farms, as well as support services to downstream customers. Further, it operates in breeding and insurance industries. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Xiamen, China.
